channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Google expands Gemini in Chrome to seven additional countries with new AI features
item.description: Google has announced the expansion of its Gemini in Chrome integration to seven additional countries: Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The rollout inc...

item.title: US Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer Resigns Amid Misconduct Allegations
item.description: Lori Chavez-DeRemer, the US Secretary of Labor under President Trump, has stepped down from her position following a series of serious allegations concerning misconduct in office. The resignation mark...

item.title: Apple announces leadership transition as Tim Cook steps down and John Ternus takes over as CEO
item.description: Apple has announced a major leadership transition, with long-serving chief executive Tim Cook set to step down after nearly 15 years in the role. Cook, who has overseen one of the most successful peri...

item.title: US–Iran–Israel tensions continue amid uncertain ceasefire talks and stalled Pakistan negotiations
item.description: The situation involving the United States, Iran, and Israel remains highly volatile as diplomatic efforts struggle to progress amid ongoing tensions and military brinkmanship. According to reports, a ...

item.title: Apple appoints John Ternus as CEO as Tim Cook transitions to executive chairman
item.description: Apple has announced a major leadership transition, with long-serving chief executive Tim Cook set to step down after nearly 15 years at the helm. Cook, who has led the company since 2011 following the...

item.title: UK government moves to formalise smartphone restrictions in English schools through legislation
item.description: The UK government has announced plans to introduce a legal requirement for schools in England to restrict the use of smartphones, reinforcing existing practices already adopted by most institutions. E...

item.title: Johannesburg tests electric vehicle charging pilot amid concerns over grid stability
item.description: Johannesburg’s City Power has officially launched its first electric vehicle (EV) charging station in Booysens as part of a pilot project aimed at supporting the city’s gradual transition to cleaner t...

item.title: Canadian tourist killed and several injured in shooting at Teotihuacán archaeological site in Mexico
item.description: A Canadian tourist has been killed and several other visitors injured after a gunman opened fire from the Pyramid of the Moon at the Teotihuacán archaeological zone near Mexico City. According to auth...

item.title: Man pleads guilty to involvement in cryptocurrency theft scheme worth £8 million
item.description: A man has admitted his involvement in a criminal scheme aimed at stealing approximately £8 million in virtual currency, highlighting ongoing risks tied to digital assets and cyber-enabled financial cr...

item.title: Tim Cook to step down as Apple CEO in September, John Ternus named successor
item.description: Apple ne officially announce kiya hai ke uske long-serving Chief Executive Officer Tim Cook September 2026 mein apni position se step down karenge. Yeh development kaafi arsey se chal rahi speculation...

item.title: Four construction workers abducted during road construction work in Tirah Valley, KP
item.description: In a troubling security incident in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa’s Tirah Valley, four construction workers engaged in a road development project were abducted by armed men on Monday. The incident took place in ...

item.title: PWHL Gold Plan rewards eliminated teams for winning instead of losing
item.description: The Professional Women’s Hockey League (PWHL) has introduced an innovative system called the “Gold Plan” to discourage teams from deliberately losing games, a practice commonly known as tanking. Unlik...

item.title: African and global ministers commit to sustainable financing for women’s, children’s and adolescents’ health
item.description: Ministers of Health and Finance from across the Global Leaders Network (GLN), together with partners such as the Women's Health and Economic Empowerment Network (WHEN) and the Partnerships for Materna...

item.title: Fire breaks out at Rajasthan refinery ahead of scheduled PM inauguration; probe ordered
item.description: A major fire broke out at the HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL) in Pachpadra, Balotra district, Rajasthan, just a day before the planned inauguration event by Prime Minister Narendra Modi. The in...

item.title: TSC denies reports of April salary delays, clarifies KEWOTA deduction dispute
item.description: The Teachers Service Commission (TSC) has dismissed circulating social media claims suggesting that teachers would experience delays in receiving their April salaries. According to the Commission, the...

item.title: North-Central States Increase Education Budgets in 2026, But All Still Below National Benchmark
item.description: A fresh review of 2026 state budgets in Nigeria’s North-central region shows that while education funding has improved in some states, none of the six states in the region met the 26 per cent educatio...

item.title: Tanzania moves to regulate lobbying through new registry to improve PPP investment and reduce delays
item.description: The Government of Tanzania is currently considering the introduction of a formal lobbyists’ registry as part of wider reforms aimed at improving transparency, protecting investors, and accelerating th...

item.title: Poll finds Americans remain skeptical of Trump’s deportation campaign
item.description: A new POLITICO poll suggests that public opinion on President Donald Trump’s immigration agenda has not shifted much, even after the White House tried to recalibrate its message. The administration so...

item.title: Concerns raised over VW Polo Vivo safety features and inconsistent airbag standardisation in South Africa
item.description: A Volkswagen Group Africa influencer marketing campaign promoting the Polo Vivo’s four-star Global NCAP adult occupant protection rating has come under scrutiny for omitting a key detail: side head-pr...

item.title: CFL veteran Adam Bighill retires after decorated career with Winnipeg Blue Bombers
item.description: Veteran CFL linebacker Adam Bighill has officially announced his retirement from professional football, concluding his career as a member of the Winnipeg Blue Bombers. The 37-year-old signed a one-day...
